attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
	SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
	SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE,
	BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	EDW_CREATE_USER,
	EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
	SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY
FROM    $$STGDB.WI_CHNL_PATTERN_BKG_AR_ERP

    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY 
					SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
					END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
					DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
					BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
					SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
					SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
					PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY
		ORDER BY PROCESS_DATE DESC	)  =1

SELECT
	NDNBT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 					SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
	NDNBT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 					SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	COALESCE(NSECT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  				END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	CASE WHEN NDNBT.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
		THEN -777
	     ELSE COALESCE(NSECT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  
	END AS 							   	DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	COALESCE(NSECT.END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE,'ACCOUNT_LOCATION')  	END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE,
	NDNBT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 					BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	/*NDNBT.PROCESS_DATE 						PROCESS_DATE,*/
	NDNBT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT 						PROCESS_DATE,
	USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ,
	NDNBT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	CASE WHEN NSO.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD IN ('CCW-FSUB','SOWB-FSUB','REVCLOUD-SALESMAIN') THEN NSO.PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY ELSE -999 END AS PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY /* added as part of athena */ 
FROM 	
(
SELECT 
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
,DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY     
,CONVERSION_DT                 
,SALES_REP_NUMBER              
,TRANSACTION_DATETIME          
,TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT   
,SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            
,CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE          
,SPLIT_PERCENTAGE              
,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     
,DD_SERVICE_FLAG               
,DD_CORP_BKG_FLAG              
,DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT 
,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,CONVERSION_RT                 
,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
,PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER         
,BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME        
,FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE          
,BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE           
,NET_PRICE_AMOUNT              
,TRANSACTION_QUANTITY          
/*,PROCESS_DATE                  */
,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT   
,BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE          
,SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG        
,DD_RMA_FLAG                   
,DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG    
,DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG      
,DD_REVENUE_FLAG               
,DD_OVERLAY_FLAG               
,DD_SALESREP_FLAG              
,DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG            
,DD_CHARGES_FLAG               
,DD_MISC_FLAG                  
,DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG           
,CORP_BKG_RECOMPUTE_FLAG       
,DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  
,DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT        
,DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY          
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT   
,ES_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            
,ORDER_DTM                     
,CANCELLED_FLG                 
,RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME      
,SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE     
,SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE            
,DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT    
,PRODUCT_KEY                   
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE    
,EDW_CREATE_USER          
,EDW_UPDATE_USER  
,EDW_CREATE_DTM
,EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    
,DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG 
,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_DRVD_NRT_BKG_TRX 
UNION ALL 
SELECT
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
,DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY     
,CONVERSION_DT                 
,SALES_REP_NUMBER              
,TRANSACTION_DATETIME          
,TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT   
,SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            
,CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE          
,SPLIT_PERCENTAGE              
,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     
,DD_SERVICE_FLAG               
,DD_CORP_BKG_FLAG              
,DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT 
,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,CONVERSION_RT                 
,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
,PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER         
,BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME        
,FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE          
,BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE           
,NET_PRICE_AMOUNT              
,TRANSACTION_QUANTITY          
/*,PROCESS_DATE                  */
,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT   
,BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE          
,SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG        
,DD_RMA_FLAG                   
,DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG    
,DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG      
,DD_REVENUE_FLAG               
,DD_OVERLAY_FLAG               
,DD_SALESREP_FLAG              
,DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG            
,DD_CHARGES_FLAG               
,DD_MISC_FLAG                  
,DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG           
,CORP_BKG_RECOMPUTE_FLAG       
,DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  
,DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT        
,DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY          
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT   
,ES_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            
,ORDER_DTM                     
,CANCELLED_FLG                 
,RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME      
,SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE     
,SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE            
,DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT    
,PRODUCT_KEY                   
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE    
,EDW_CREATE_USER          
,EDW_UPDATE_USER  
,EDW_CREATE_DTM
,EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    
,DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG 
,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_DRVD_NRT_DEBOOKINGS_TRX 
WHERE CANCEL_CODE='Lost Order' OR BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY < 0
UNION ALL /* CBM Changes */
 SELECT
    BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
    ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT MOD 100 AS BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
    ,DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY     
    ,CONVERSION_DT
    ,SALES_REP_NUMBER
    ,TRANSACTION_DATETIME
    ,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)  AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT
    ,SALES_CHANNEL_CODE
    ,CAST('OPL' AS CHAR(50)) as CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE
    ,BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT            
    ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT/100 AS BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
    ,SERVICE_FLG                   
    ,CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        
    ,DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
    ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT 
    ,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    ,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
    ,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    ,CONVERSION_RT
    ,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    ,DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT           
    ,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER
    ,CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME
    ,FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG           
    ,CAST(100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE
    ,CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
    ,DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY  AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY
    ,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT       
    ,DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD            
    ,SALES_ORDER_KEY     
    ,'=' AS DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG      
    ,RMA_FLG                       
    ,INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG                
    ,REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG          
    ,REVENUE_FLG                   
    ,OVERLAY_FLG                   
    ,SALESREP_FLG                  
    ,IC_REVENUE_FLG                
    ,CHARGES_FLG                   
    ,MISC_FLG                      
    ,ACQUISITION_FLG               
    ,'=' AS CORP_BKG_RECOMPUTE_FLAG
    ,DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  
    ,DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT        
    ,DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY          
    ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
    ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT   
    ,CAST(-999 AS BIGINT) AS ES_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT
    ,CAST( NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS ORDER_DTM
    ,CANCELLED_FLG                 
    ,DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM           
    ,DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE  
    ,'OPL' AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    ,DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
    ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
    ,DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD  
    ,PRODUCT_KEY                   
    ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
    ,SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE        
    ,EDW_CREATE_USER          
    ,EDW_UPDATE_USER  
    ,EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
    ,EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
    ,DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG   
    ,DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG                            
    ,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
    FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE
    WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP'
    AND ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'CLOUD-CBM'
 ) NDNBT

INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PROCESS_DATES_CHANNEL_MTX NFM_CURR
	/*ON NDNBT.PROCESS_DATE = BK_CALENDAR_DATE */
	ON NDNBT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT = BK_CALENDAR_DATE 

/* added as part of athena */	
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
ON NDNBT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
AND NSO.SS_CODE='CG'
/* end */	
	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_END_CUSTOMER NSECT
	ON NSECT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= NDNBT.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
	
WHERE NDNBT.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE <> 'DVAD'	

QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY 
					NDNBT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
					COALESCE(NSECT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999),
					CASE WHEN NDNBT.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
						  THEN -777
					     ELSE COALESCE(NSECT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  
					END,
					NDNBT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
					NDNBT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY	,
                    NDNBT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
                    CASE WHEN NSO.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD  IN ('CCW-FSUB','SOWB-FSUB','REVCLOUD-SALESMAIN') THEN NSO.PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY ELSE -999 END  /* added as part of athena */					
		/*ORDER BY NDNBT.PROCESS_DATE DESC	*/
		ORDER BY NDNBT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT DESC	
		)  =1

SELECT 
	CALENDAR_DATE  
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL
 	ON  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT =FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
